title: The Cable Television Networks(Regulation) Amendment Act, 2007
description: The Cable Television Networks(Regulation) Amendment Act, 2007

PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY ^ 30] ^ ft**ft WRIT, ^ 29, 2007 / * t e 8,1929 No. 30j NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, MAY 29,2007 /JYAISTHA 8,1929 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation. MINISTRY OFLAW AND JUSTICE (Legislative Department) New Delhi, the29thMay, 2007/Jyaistka 8, 1929 (Saka) The following Act of Parliament received the'assent of the President on the 28th May, 2007, and is hereby published for general information;— THE CABLE TELEVISION NETWORKS (REGULATION) AMENDMENT ACT, 2007 No. 25 OF 2007 [28r/iJWaK2007.] AnAct further to amend the Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Act, 1995. BE it enacted by Parliament in the Fifty-eighth Year of the Republic of India as follows:— 1. This Act may be called the Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Amendment Short title. Act, 2007. 2. In the Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Act, 1995, in section 8, for sub- Amendment sections (I) and (2), the following sub-sections shall be substituted, namely:— o f sectl0R 8 of Act 7 of "(i) Every cable operator shall re-transmit,— • " 5 (/) channels operated by or on behalf of Parliament in the manner and name as may be specified by the Central Government by notification in the Official Gazette; -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 1] (/'/) at least two Doordarshan terrestrial channels and one regional language channel of a State in the prime band, in satellite mode on frequencies other than those carrying terrestrial frequencies. (2) The channels referred to in sub-section (I) shall be re-transmitted without any deletion or alteration of any programme transmitted on such channels.". K.N.CHATURVEDI, Secy, to the Govt, of India. PRINTED BY THE MANAGER, GOVT. OF INDIA PRESS, MINTO ROAD, NEW DELHI AND PUBLISHED BY THE CONTROLLER OF PUBLICATIONS, DELHI, 2007.
